ownershipModes.summary: The host content slot owns the white-body or split workspace.
The page-level surface owns the white-body while the host slot is neutralized.

ownershipRoles.summary: The host layout content slot that receives the page root.
The single white working surface for list, detail, or edit content.
The single owner of outer padding and workspace inset.
The single owner of the main vertical scrolling chain.

invariants: A page can bind exactly one example page.
A page can bind exactly one host archetype.
Outer padding must have exactly one owner.
Main vertical scroll must have exactly one owner.
The host content slot and white-body cannot both own padding/background/radius/overflow.
